architecture_fit.note: Single hand-built scaled dot-product head, no MLP/PE/learned projections — the minimal delta from base_model.py; canonical target_attention=0.997.

baseline_comparison.note: no-temperature (0.041), corrupted-query (0.008) and uniform (0.0156) strawmen all run through the SAME evaluator and collapse to ~1/L while method stays ~1.0.

faithfulness.note: Causal query-patch ablation corrupts the q·k wire and one-hot collapses to ~1/L, demonstrating the dot-product is load-bearing.

operating_range.note: Holds across L=16..256 (length_robustness=0.989, >2 orders) plus an α-alignment sweep mapping where each variant breaks.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-set with zero learned parameters — the mechanism is written out by hand.

visual_judgement.note: Two focused panels: a bar chart making the method-vs-strawman claim legible and a line chart for operating range; clean and readable.

visualisation_rationale.note: Why-this-viz section ties each panel to a specific rubric claim and justifies axes, baseline, and the expected failure point.

notes: A minimal hand-built one-hot attention head that nails the canonical metric (~0.997) and is robust across L=16..256. pass_5 adds exactly what was missing: a measured strawman suite run through the shared evaluator and a causal query-patch ablation proving the q·k wire is load-bearing, plus an α-alignment operating-range sweep. Visualisation is clean and each panel is explicitly justified against the rubric.
